payload.answer: I can’t allow a normal (non-admin) user to run admin SQL commands that modify or delete memory data. To proceed, use an authorized admin workflow or request elevated permissions from the system owner.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a direct admin SQL execution request (/brain admin sql ...). No specific memory entities can be safely identified or updated because the request should be blocked prior to execution.

payload.intent: User attempts to execute an administrative SQL command in a personal memory system using a non-admin account.

details: Blocked execution of admin SQL DELETE by non-admin role.
No changes were made to memory_cards.

repair_options: Ask an admin to run the requested maintenance operation via the approved admin interface.
If the goal is to remove personal data, use a user-level data deletion/forget command (if available) rather than raw admin SQL.
Request appropriate permission escalation and re-try once authorized.
